understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the character on the tile grid to reach the goal gem tile '+'; touching spikes 'u'/'v' causes an immediate loss, so the objective is to create and take safe landing paths that ultimately drop (in the current gravity direction) onto the goal.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only) or CLICK/UNDO. After any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (e.g., o/m/w), hit a hazard (spikes u/v), or reach the goal. CLICK targets a specific coordinate [x,y] to interact with clickable tiles (notably removing breakable blocks 'x') without changing the player’s position; clicks are used to open/modify fall paths. UNDO reverses the previous action. Planning uses the state’s predicted left_landing/right_landing and corridor_scan to pick moves that safely lead to beneficial drops (passages) while avoiding spikes.
